nodes.title: Character Descriptions
widgets_values:
- Describe the shot sounds effects.

Final output give a detailed sfx  sound design for the provided image to produce a video with sound, no timestep only in text prompt.
an man walks and a girl walking in a dungeons, man says "We must be ready! Don't you agree? "
